en: Sit, feet strapped, grab handle.
Drive with legs first, then back, then arms.
Reverse: arms, back, legs — return slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 双脚扣紧, 抓住手柄.
腿先发力, 然后背, 最后手臂.
回程顺序相反: 手臂, 背, 腿 — 缓慢返回.

en: Don't yank with arms first — leads to back strain.
zh-Hans: 不要先用手臂拉 — 容易拉伤背部.

en: Set damper 6-8, all-out 250-500 m intervals.
Explosive leg drive — drive through heels.
Rest 1:1 or 1:2 work:rest ratio.
zh-Hans: 腿部爆发蹬出 — 脚跟发力.

en: Maintain form even at high pace — back stays braced.
zh-Hans: 高速时也要保持动作标准 — 背部始终绷紧.

en: Set speed 3-6 km/h, comfortable pace.
Walk upright, swing arms naturally.
Hold rails only for balance, not support.
zh-Hans: 速度 3-6 km/h, 舒适步速.
上身挺直, 自然摆臂.
扶把手只是为了平衡, 不要靠它支撑.

en: Set speed 8-12 km/h, steady aerobic pace.
Land mid-foot, relaxed shoulders.
Breathe rhythmically — nasal in, mouth out.
zh-Hans: 速度 8-12 km/h, 稳定有氧速度.
前脚掌着地, 肩膀放松.
节奏呼吸 — 鼻吸口呼.

en: Step off the belt at the end — don't jump off mid-stride.
zh-Hans: 跑完先按停再下 — 不要跳下来.

en: Incline 8-15%, speed 4-6 km/h.
Lean slightly forward from ankles.
Don't hold rails — let glutes do the work.
zh-Hans: 从脚踝处略前倾.
不要扶把手 — 让臀部发力.

en: Adjust seat: slight knee bend at bottom.
Hands light on bars, core engaged.
Steady 70-90 RPM at moderate resistance.
zh-Hans: 调座椅: 蹬到底时膝盖微弯.
双手轻扶把手, 核心收紧.
中等阻力, 稳定 70-90 RPM.

en: Sit back fully, back supported.
Feet flat on pedals, smooth circles.
Lower-impact option — good for joints.
zh-Hans: 完全坐靠, 背部贴紧靠背.
脚平放踏板, 顺畅画圆.
低冲击选项 — 对关节友好.

en: Seat height at hip, slight forward lean.
Mix seated and standing climbs.
Add resistance for hills, drop for sprints.
zh-Hans: 座位高度与髋同高, 略前倾.
坐姿和站姿爬坡交替.
爬坡加阻力, 冲刺减阻力.

en: Don't bounce on saddle — keep hips stable.
zh-Hans: 不要在坐垫上蹦 — 髋部保持稳定.

en: Feet flat, full foot pressure.
Push and pull handles for full-body work.
Tall posture, light grip — no leaning.
zh-Hans: 脚平放踏板, 全脚施力.
推拉把手实现全身训练.
身体挺直, 轻握 — 不要靠在上面.

en: Step fully — let heel touch each step.
Stand tall, no leaning on rails.
Steady cadence, drive through glutes.
zh-Hans: 完整踩步 — 脚跟着步面.
站姿挺直, 不要靠扶手.
稳定节奏, 臀部发力.

en: Don't hunch over rails — defeats the workout.
zh-Hans: 不要趴在扶手上 — 失去训练效果.

en: Grip handles, push and pull aggressively.
Drive legs at the same time.
Common for HIIT: 30s on, 30s off.
zh-Hans: 握住把手, 强力推拉.
同时蹬腿发力.
适合 HIIT: 30 秒训练, 30 秒休息.

en: Brutal output — ease in if you're new.
zh-Hans: 强度极高 — 新手循序渐进.

en: Stand tall, grab handles overhead.
Hinge hips, pull down to thighs.
Lats and core drive — not arms.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 双手抓住顶部把手.
髋部铰链, 下拉至大腿.
背阔肌和核心发力 — 不是手臂.

en: Hinge from hips, don't round back.
zh-Hans: 髋部铰链, 不要圆背.

en: Stand on pedals, hold rails lightly.
Forward arc motion, smooth glide.
Lower joint impact than treadmill.
zh-Hans: 站在踏板上, 轻扶把手.
前向弧线运动, 顺畅滑动.
比跑步机对关节冲击更小.

en: Steady aerobic pace, can hold conversation.
Land mid-foot, short stride.
Relaxed arms, gaze forward.
zh-Hans: 稳定有氧速度, 可以聊天.
前脚掌落地, 步幅适中.
手臂放松, 目视前方.

en: Build mileage gradually — 10% rule per week.
zh-Hans: 逐步增加跑量 — 每周最多加 10%.

en: All-out effort 40-100 m intervals.
Drive knees high, arms pump aggressively.
Full recovery: 2-3 min between sprints.
zh-Hans: 全力 40-100 米间歇.
高抬膝, 手臂强力摆动.
充分恢复: 冲刺间 2-3 分钟.

en: Warm up thoroughly — hamstring strain risk.
Don't sprint on cold muscles or hard pavement only.
zh-Hans: 充分热身 — 容易拉伤腘绳肌.
肌肉未热不要冲刺, 避免硬地面.

en: Alternate hard 400-800 m with easy jogs.
Push 85-90% effort during the hard.
Active recovery: light jog, not walk.
zh-Hans: 400-800 米快跑和慢跑交替.
积极恢复: 慢跑, 不要停下来.

en: Build base mileage before adding intervals.
zh-Hans: 先建立基础跑量再加入间歇.

en: Find a 30-60s hill, moderate grade.
Drive knees high, arms strong.
Walk down for recovery, repeat 6-10x.
zh-Hans: 找一个 30-60 秒坡道, 中等坡度.
高抬膝, 手臂强力摆动.
走下坡恢复, 重复 6-10 次.

en: Don't sprint downhill — high injury risk.
zh-Hans: 不要冲下坡 — 受伤风险高.

en: Conversational pace, 60+ minutes.
Fuel and hydrate for longer efforts.
Focus on consistency, not speed.
zh-Hans: 聊天速度, 60 分钟以上.
长距离需要补给和补水.
重点是稳定性, 不是速度.

en: Watch for overuse injuries — knees, IT band, shins.
zh-Hans: 注意过度使用伤 — 膝盖, 髂胫束, 胫骨.

en: Helmet on, check bike fit.
Smooth circles, 70-90 RPM cadence.
Shift gears to maintain effort on terrain.
zh-Hans: 戴头盔, 检查车身贴合度.
顺畅画圆, 踏频 70-90 RPM.
根据地形换挡, 保持稳定输出.

en: Always wear helmet, watch for traffic.
zh-Hans: 务必戴头盔, 注意交通.

en: Stand on technical sections, weight back.
Eyes ahead, scan line 5-10 m out.
Brake before turns, not in them.
zh-Hans: 技术路段站立骑行, 重心后移.
眼睛向前, 提前看 5-10 米路线.
弯前刹车, 不要弯中刹车.

en: Full kit: helmet, gloves, eyewear.
Know your skill limits on technical trails.
zh-Hans: 全套装备: 头盔, 手套, 眼镜.
技术路段要量力而行.

en: Heavy resistance, all-out 20-60 s.
Stay seated or stand, drive hard.
Recover 2-3x sprint length between.
zh-Hans: 高阻力, 全力 20-60 秒.
坐姿或站姿, 强力蹬.
休息时间为冲刺的 2-3 倍.

en: Don't bounce hips in saddle at high effort.
zh-Hans: 高强度时不要在车座上颠.

en: Streamlined body position, head neutral.
Rotate from core, high elbow catch.
Bilateral breathing — every 3 strokes.
zh-Hans: 流线型身体, 头部中立.
核心转动, 高肘抓水.
双侧呼吸 — 每 3 划一次.

en: Never swim alone in open water.
zh-Hans: 开放水域不要单独游泳.

en: Glide phase between pulls.
Whip kick, heels to butt then snap.
Breathe at top of pull cycle.
zh-Hans: 划水之间有滑行阶段.
蛙腿: 脚跟到臀部然后蹬开.
划水顶端换气.

en: Lie back, hips up, body level.
Alternating arm pull, pinky enters first.
Steady flutter kick, head still.
zh-Hans: 仰躺, 髋部上浮, 身体水平.
交替手臂划水, 小指先入水.
稳定打腿, 头部不动.

en: Watch lane line position — no walls to look at.
zh-Hans: 注意泳道位置 — 看不到墙.

en: Both arms pull together, recover over water.
Two dolphin kicks per arm cycle.
Wave-like undulation from chest.
zh-Hans: 双臂同时划水, 水面上回臂.
每一次划水配两次海豚腿.
从胸部发起的波浪动作.

en: Highly technical — build skill in short sets.
zh-Hans: 技术要求高 — 短组练习.

en: Elbows close, wrists turn the rope.
Light bounces on balls of feet.
Stay relaxed, breathe steady.
zh-Hans: 肘部贴身, 手腕转绳.
前脚掌轻巧跳起.
全身放松, 稳定呼吸.

en: Higher jump, two rope passes per jump.
Faster wrist rotation, not arm.
Tight body, no pike or tuck.
zh-Hans: 跳得稍高, 每跳绳过两次.
加快手腕转速, 不是手臂.
身体绷紧, 不要折叠或团身.

en: Master single bounces first — calf strain risk.
zh-Hans: 先掌握单摇 — 容易拉伤小腿.

en: Alternate foot pattern — light shift side to side.
Keep rhythm steady, near continuous.
Looks like jogging in place over the rope.
zh-Hans: 双脚交替 — 左右轻巧移动.
节奏稳定, 几乎不停.
看起来像原地慢跑跳过绳.

en: Drive knees to waist height each rep.
Quick rope turn, fast feet.
Tight core to control knee drive.
zh-Hans: 膝盖每次抬到腰部高度.
快速转绳, 脚下迅速.
核心绷紧控制提膝.

en: Sturdy shoes, layered clothing.
Steady pace, short steps on inclines.
Hydrate often, fuel for long hikes.
zh-Hans: 穿稳固鞋, 多层穿搭.
步速稳定, 上坡小步.
勤补水, 长途要补给.

en: Tell someone your route, carry essentials.
zh-Hans: 告知他人路线, 带必需品.

en: Loaded pack 10-30% bodyweight.
Brisk walking pace, upright posture.
Pack high and tight on back.
zh-Hans: 负重包 10-30% 体重.
快走速度, 上身挺直.
包贴近背部高位放置.

en: Start light, build load over weeks.
Maintain posture — don't hunch under load.
zh-Hans: 从轻到重, 周周增加.
保持姿态 — 不要被压驼背.

en: Find sustained hill or stairs.
Lean slightly forward from ankles.
Drive through glutes, steady breath.
zh-Hans: 找连续坡道或楼梯.
从脚踝处略前倾.
臀部发力, 稳定呼吸.

en: Find a multi-flight staircase.
Full foot on each step, push through heel.
Don't grab railing — let legs work.
zh-Hans: 找多层楼梯.
整脚踩稳, 脚跟发力.
不要扶栏杆 — 让腿发力.

en: Watch footing going down — easy to trip.
zh-Hans: 下楼留意脚下 — 容易踩空.

en: 20 s all-out work, 10 s rest.
Repeat 8 rounds = 4 minutes total.
Pick a cyclic movement (sprint, burpee, bike).
zh-Hans: 20 秒全力, 10 秒休息.
8 轮 = 共 4 分钟.
选周期性动作 (冲刺, 波比跳, 单车).

en: Maximum effort required — warm up well first.
zh-Hans: 要全力以赴 — 先充分热身.

en: Every Minute On the Minute: do X reps.
Rest the remainder of each minute.
Pick rep count you can finish in ~40s.
zh-Hans: 每分钟开始时做 X 次.
剩余时间为休息.
选你 40 秒能完成的次数.

en: 100-400 m at near-max effort.
Walk or jog half the distance to recover.
6-10 reps, scale to fitness.
zh-Hans: 走或慢跑一半距离恢复.
6-10 次, 根据能力调整.

en: Thorough warm-up — hamstrings are at risk.
Avoid concrete — use track or grass.
zh-Hans: 充分热身 — 腘绳肌易拉伤.
避免水泥地 — 用塑胶跑道或草地.

en: Light bounce on balls of feet.
Throw combos — jab, cross, hook.
Rotate from hips, exhale on each punch.
zh-Hans: 前脚掌轻巧跳动.
打组合拳 — 刺拳, 直拳, 勾拳.
髋部转动, 每拳呼气.

en: Don't hyperextend elbows at end of punch.
zh-Hans: 出拳时不要过伸肘关节.

en: Plank position, drive knees to chest.
Alternate fast — keep hips low.
30-60 s bursts, repeat for time.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 膝盖快速抬向胸口.
交替快速 — 髋部不要抬高.
30-60 秒爆发, 重复多组.

en: Run in place, drive knees to waist.
Land on balls of feet, quick contact.
Pump arms in sync with legs.
zh-Hans: 原地跑, 膝盖抬至腰部.
前脚掌着地, 快速触地.
手臂与腿同步摆动.

en: Run in place, kick heels to glutes.
Quick tempo, upright torso.
Use for warmup or HIIT bursts.
zh-Hans: 原地跑, 脚跟踢到臀部.
节奏快, 上身挺直.
适合热身或 HIIT 间歇.

en: Jump feet wide, arms overhead.
Jump back to start in one motion.
Steady rhythm, soft landings.
zh-Hans: 跳开双脚, 双臂上举过头.
一气呵成跳回起始位.
节奏稳定, 落地轻柔.

en: Bound side to side, land on outside foot.
Other foot crosses behind.
Swing arms naturally for momentum.
zh-Hans: 侧向跳跃, 外侧脚落地.
另一只脚从后方交叉.
手臂自然摆动.

en: Hinge hips, KB between legs.
Snap hips forward — float to chest height.
Use for high-rep cardio: 20-30 reps EMOM.
zh-Hans: 髋部铰链, 壶铃从两腿间穿过.
髋部前推 — 壶铃浮至胸高.
用作高次数有氧: EMOM 20-30 次.

en: Hinge from hips, not knees — protect lower back.
Don't use arms to lift — they just guide.
zh-Hans: 髋部铰链, 不是膝盖 — 保护下背.
不要用手臂提 — 手臂只引导.

en: Forward lean, arms locked on handles.
Drive forward with legs, short steps.
Push for distance or time — 10-30 m.
zh-Hans: 身体前倾, 双臂锁在把手.
腿部前推, 步幅小.
推距离或时间 — 10-30 米.

en: Backward walk, lean back slightly.
Pull straps to chest each step.
Quads burn — drive through heels.
zh-Hans: 倒退走, 略向后倾.
每步将带子拉向胸口.
股四头肌发力 — 脚跟蹬地.

en: Watch behind you for obstacles.
zh-Hans: 注意身后障碍物.

en: Heavy DBs/KBs at sides, stand tall.
Walk steady steps, no leaning.
30-60 s walks, repeat for distance.
zh-Hans: 重哑铃/壶铃挂体侧, 站直.
稳步走, 不要偏倒.
30-60 秒行走, 多组累计距离.

en: Keep shoulders back — don't shrug under load.
zh-Hans: 保持挺胸 — 负重时不要耸肩.

en: Hands and toes, knees just off floor.
Crawl forward — opposite hand & foot move together.
Hips low, back flat.
zh-Hans: 双手脚趾撑地, 膝盖略离地.
向前爬 — 对侧手脚同时动.
髋部放低, 背部平直.

en: Stand 30 cm from box, feet shoulder-width.
Quarter squat, swing arms, jump explosively.
Land softly on box, full standing position.
zh-Hans: 站在箱前 30 cm, 双脚与肩同宽.
四分之一蹲, 摆臂, 爆发跳起.
轻柔落到箱上, 完全站立姿态.

en: Step down — don't jump down (impacts knees/Achilles).
Use a box you can comfortably jump 80% of the time.
zh-Hans: 下来要走 — 不要跳下来 (冲击膝盖 / 跟腱).
选你能稳跳 80% 的箱高.

en: Step off box, land on both feet.
Immediately rebound into vertical jump.
Minimize ground contact time.
zh-Hans: 从箱上踏下, 双脚落地.
立即反弹起跳.
尽量减少触地时间.

en: High impact — only for trained athletes.
Use 30-60 cm box, build strength base first.
zh-Hans: 高冲击 — 只适合受过训练的人.
用 30-60 cm 箱, 先打好力量基础.

en: Quarter squat, swing arms back.
Explode forward and up — arms drive.
Land soft, both feet, knees bent.
zh-Hans: 四分之一蹲, 双臂后摆.
向前向上爆发跳 — 手臂带动.
双脚轻柔落地, 膝盖弯曲.

en: Reset between reps — no fatigue jumps.
zh-Hans: 每次跳之间重置 — 疲劳时不要勉强.

en: Counter-movement: quarter squat fast.
Reach for ceiling — arms drive up.
Land soft, reset fully between reps.
zh-Hans: 反向蹲: 快速四分之一蹲.
向天花板伸手 — 手臂上摆.
轻柔落地, 每次完全恢复.

en: Jump straight up, knees to chest.
Quickly extend legs to land.
Soft landing, repeat fast tempo.
zh-Hans: 垂直跳起, 双膝抬至胸口.
快速伸腿准备落地.
轻柔落地, 快节奏重复.

en: Stop if form breaks — high impact movement.
zh-Hans: 动作变形要停 — 高冲击动作.

en: Lunge position, front knee at 90°.
Jump up, switch legs in air.
Land in opposite lunge, repeat.
zh-Hans: 弓步姿势, 前膝 90°.
起跳, 空中换腿.
落地变成相反弓步, 重复.

en: Knee tracks over toes, no inward collapse.
zh-Hans: 膝盖跟脚尖方向, 不要内扣.

en: Exaggerated running stride — push hard off back leg.
Drive front knee high, arms drive opposite.
Cover max distance per stride, 30-50 m sets.
zh-Hans: 夸张跑步步伐 — 后腿强力蹬出.
前膝高抬, 手臂对侧摆动.
每步距离最大化, 每组 30-50 米.

en: High impact — avoid hard surfaces, build slowly.
zh-Hans: 高冲击 — 避免硬地面, 循序渐进.

en: Stand on one leg, hop forward.
Stick the landing on same leg.
Switch legs each set, 6-10 hops.
zh-Hans: 单脚站立, 向前跳.
同一只脚稳定落地.
每组换腿, 6-10 跳.

en: Master double-leg landings first.
zh-Hans: 先掌握双脚落地.

en: Stand on one leg, push off sideways.
Land on opposite leg, stick the landing.
Bound side to side, controlled.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 侧向蹬出.
对侧腿落地, 稳住.
左右跳, 注意控制.

en: Knee should track over toes on landing.
zh-Hans: 落地时膝盖跟脚尖方向一致.

en: Full squat down, hips below knees.
Explode straight up, full extension.
Land soft, descend into next rep.
zh-Hans: 完整深蹲, 髋低于膝.
向上爆发跳, 完全伸展.
轻柔落地, 接下一次.

en: Squat, hands down, jump to plank.
Do push-up, jump feet to hands.
Stand, jump straight up — reach overhead.
zh-Hans: 下蹲, 双手撑地, 跳出至平板支撑.
做一个俯卧撑, 双脚跳回手前.
站起, 垂直跳起 — 双手上举.

en: Pace yourself — high-fatigue movement.
zh-Hans: 注意节奏 — 极易疲劳.

en: Squat, hands down, jump to plank.
Skip push-up, jump feet back in.
Stand, jump up — reach overhead.
zh-Hans: 下蹲, 双手撑地, 跳出至平板.
省略俯卧撑, 双脚跳回.
站起, 跳起 — 双手上举.

en: Standard burpee through push-up phase.
Stand and broad jump forward.
Land soft, immediately into next burpee.
zh-Hans: 标准波比跳含俯卧撑.
起身后向前立定跳远.
轻柔落地, 立即下一次.

en: Drop into lunge, back knee near floor.
Explode straight up — switch legs in air.
Land in opposite lunge, repeat.
zh-Hans: 下沉到弓步, 后膝接近地面.
向上爆发跳 — 空中换腿.
落地变成相反弓步, 重复.

en: Lunge stance, knees both bent.
Jump up, scissor legs mid-air.
Land in new lunge, immediately continue.
zh-Hans: 弓步姿势, 双膝弯曲.
起跳, 空中剪刀换腿.
落地为新弓步, 立即继续.

en: Stop if knee pain — high impact.
zh-Hans: 膝盖疼要停 — 高冲击动作.

en: Hold ball overhead, full extension.
Slam ball straight down with hips and lats.
Catch on bounce, repeat fast.
zh-Hans: 药球举过头, 充分伸展.
髋部和背阔肌发力砸下.
接住反弹, 快速重复.

en: Use slam ball (no bounce), not basketball.
zh-Hans: 用无弹力药球, 不要用篮球.

en: Hold ball at chest, face wall or partner.
Explosive press — both hands push hard.
Catch on rebound, immediate return.
zh-Hans: 药球抱胸, 面对墙或同伴.
爆发推出 — 双手强力推.
接住反弹, 立即返回.

en: Stand sideways to wall, ball at hip.
Rotate from hips, throw ball at wall.
Catch on rebound, immediate next rep.
zh-Hans: 侧身对墙, 药球放髋部.
髋部带动旋转, 砸向墙面.
接住反弹, 立即下一次.

en: Squat low, ball between legs.
Drive up, swing arms, release overhead.
Aim for max distance or height.
zh-Hans: 下蹲, 药球于两腿之间.
起身, 摆臂, 过头抛出.
追求最大距离或高度.

en: Raise ball straight overhead.
Slam down forcefully — hinge through hips.
Pick up, repeat — controlled tempo.
zh-Hans: 药球高举过头.
强力砸下 — 髋部铰链.
捡起重复 — 控制节奏.

en: Quarter squat, grip ropes firmly.
Alternate arm waves — one up, one down.
Generate fast, even rhythm.
zh-Hans: 四分之一蹲, 双手握绳.
交替手臂波浪 — 一上一下.
节奏快速均匀.

en: Both arms move up and down together.
Drive waves from shoulders and core.
Stay athletic in low quarter squat.
zh-Hans: 双手同步上下运动.
肩膀和核心带动波浪.
保持运动姿势四分之一蹲.

en: Raise ropes overhead, full extension.
Slam down hard, hinge at hips.
Reset and explode again, rhythmic.
zh-Hans: 双绳举过头, 充分伸展.
强力砸下, 髋部铰链.
重置再爆发, 富有节奏.

en: Hold ropes, make small or large circles.
Switch direction every 15-20 s.
Engage shoulders and core throughout.
zh-Hans: 握住绳子, 画大圈或小圈.
每 15-20 秒换方向.
全程肩部和核心收紧.

en: One hand on one rope, free arm to side.
Generate fast wave from shoulder.
Switch arms each set.
zh-Hans: 单手握单绳, 另一臂自然下垂.
肩部带动快速波浪.
每组换手.

en: Step off box, land with both feet.
Absorb landing — knees bend, hips back.
Hold stick landing 2 s, step back up.
zh-Hans: 从箱上踏下, 双脚落地.
缓冲落地 — 膝弯, 髋后推.
稳住 2 秒, 走回箱上.

en: Start with low box — assess landing form.
zh-Hans: 从低箱开始 — 检查落地动作.

en: Plank position, hands shoulder-width.
Lower chest to floor — body straight.
Press up, full elbow extension.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 双手与肩同宽.
胸部下降至接近地面 — 身体保持直线.
推起, 手肘完全伸直.

en: Hands together, index & thumbs form diamond.
Elbows track close to ribs.
Lower chest to hands, press back up.
zh-Hans: 双手并拢, 食指拇指形成钻石.
肘部贴近肋骨.
胸口接近手, 推起.

en: Hard on wrists — modify hand position if pain.
zh-Hans: 对手腕负担大 — 疼就换手位.

en: Hands well outside shoulder width.
Lower chest to floor, control descent.
Press up, focus on outer chest squeeze.
zh-Hans: 双手宽于肩.
胸部下降至地, 控制下放.
推起, 感受外侧胸收紧.

en: Too wide stresses shoulders — find your range.
zh-Hans: 太宽伤肩 — 找到合适距离.

en: Wide hands, lower toward one side.
Working arm bends, other stays straight.
Push back to center, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 宽距手, 身体倾向一侧.
工作臂弯曲, 另一臂保持直.
推回中央, 左右交替.

en: Bridge step to one-arm push-ups — advanced movement.
zh-Hans: 通向单臂俯卧撑 — 高阶动作.

en: Feet elevated on bench/box, hands on floor.
Lower chest to floor, body straight.
Press up, emphasize upper chest.
zh-Hans: 双脚放凳/箱上, 双手撑地.
胸部下降, 身体保持直线.
推起, 强化上胸.

en: Hands on bench/box, feet on floor.
Lower chest to bench, press up.
Easier than floor — good for beginners.
zh-Hans: 双手撑凳/箱, 双脚着地.
胸部下降至凳, 推起.
比地面易 — 适合新手.

en: Hands at hips, fingers pointed back.
Lean forward — weight over hands.
Lower, press up — heavy on delts.
zh-Hans: 双手放髋部位置, 手指朝后.
上身前倾 — 重量在双手上.
下放, 推起 — 重压三角肌.

en: Wrist intensive — warm wrists thoroughly.
zh-Hans: 手腕负担大 — 充分热身手腕.

en: Downward dog start, hips high.
Swoop chest down, slide through low.
Press up to upward dog, reverse motion.
zh-Hans: 下犬式起始, 髋部高.
胸部下扫, 滑过低点.
推起至上犬式, 反向回到起始.

en: Standard push-up rep.
At top, rotate to side plank, arm overhead.
Return, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 标准俯卧撑一次.
顶部旋转成侧平板, 一臂上举.
返回, 左右交替.

en: As you lower, drive one knee to elbow.
Press up, knee back to start.
Alternate knee each rep.
zh-Hans: 下放时, 一膝向同侧肘靠.
推起, 膝回到起始位.
每次换膝.

en: Do push-up, then step hand & foot to side.
Push-up in new position, step again.
Move sideways across the floor.
zh-Hans: 做一个俯卧撑, 同侧手脚向侧迈.
新位置再俯卧撑, 再迈.
横向移动.

en: Lower fully — chest touches floor.
Lift palms off ground briefly.
Replace hands, press back up.
zh-Hans: 完全下放 — 胸部触地.
短暂抬起双手.
手放回, 推起.

en: Support on bars, arms locked.
Lean forward for chest, vertical for triceps.
Lower until shoulders below elbows, press up.
zh-Hans: 撑在双杠上, 手臂锁定.
前倾练胸, 直立练三头.
下放至肩低于肘, 推起.

en: Don't overstretch at bottom — shoulder strain risk.
Build up to full dips with negatives.
zh-Hans: 底部不要过度下放 — 容易伤肩.
通过离心动作慢慢练全程.

en: Sit on bench edge, hands grip behind hips.
Slide off, lower hips by bending elbows.
Press up to start, full extension.
zh-Hans: 坐凳边, 双手抓凳边在身后.
髋部下滑, 弯肘下放.
推回起始, 完全伸直.

en: Don't roll shoulders forward — chest open.
zh-Hans: 不要含胸 — 挺胸.

en: Support on rings, rings turned out at top.
Lower with control, ribs over rings.
Press up, turn rings out at lockout.
zh-Hans: 撑在吊环上, 顶部环外旋.
缓慢下放, 肋骨过环.
推起, 顶部锁定环外旋.

en: Build with parallel bar dips first.
Bicep tendon strain risk — go slow.
zh-Hans: 先掌握双杠臂屈伸.
易拉伤肱二头肌腱 — 慢慢练.

en: Mount above bar — false grip optional.
Lean forward, lower with control.
Press up, bar at hip — advanced movement.
zh-Hans: 从杠上方撑住 — 可用假握.
前倾, 控制下放.
推起, 杠至髋部 — 高阶动作.

en: Master parallel bar + ring dips first.
zh-Hans: 先掌握双杠 + 吊环臂屈伸.

en: Stand on one leg, other extended forward.
Squat down all the way, other leg horizontal.
Drive up through heel of standing leg.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 另一腿前伸.
完全下蹲, 另一腿水平.
支撑腿脚跟发力站起.

en: Requires extreme ankle mobility.
Use TRX or pole assist while learning.
zh-Hans: 需要极佳脚踝灵活性.
学习时用 TRX 或杆辅助.

en: Stand on one leg, other knee bent behind.
Hold opposite ankle for balance.
Squat down — back knee taps floor.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 另一膝在身后弯曲.
对侧手握脚踝平衡.
下蹲 — 后膝点地.

en: Build up to from beginner shrimp progressions.
zh-Hans: 从初阶虾蹲进阶.

en: Stand, hold something for balance.
Bend knees forward, lean back, heels lift.
Lower until knees fully bent, drive back up.
zh-Hans: 站立, 扶物体保持平衡.
膝盖前推, 身体后仰, 脚跟抬起.
下放至膝盖完全弯曲, 起身.

en: High knee stress — skip if knee issues.
zh-Hans: 膝盖压力大 — 膝盖有问题别做.

en: Hands on floor or parallettes, legs straight out.
Lift hips, legs parallel to floor.
Hold for time — depress shoulders.
zh-Hans: 双手撑地或撑架, 双腿前伸.
髋部抬起, 双腿与地面平行.
保持时间 — 肩部下压.

en: From L-sit, raise legs higher.
Body forms V — legs above 45°.
Hold — extreme core strength.
zh-Hans: 从 L 支撑开始, 双腿抬更高.
身体呈 V — 腿高于 45°.
保持 — 极强核心.

en: Master L-sit before attempting V-sit.
zh-Hans: 先掌握 L 支撑.

en: Lie on bench, grip behind head.
Lift body straight up — only shoulders touch.
Lower under control, body parallel to bench.
zh-Hans: 躺凳上, 双手抓凳后端.
全身直线抬起 — 只有肩部贴凳.
缓慢下放, 身体与凳平行.

en: Lower back at risk — keep body rigid.
Progress through tuck, advanced tuck, single leg.
zh-Hans: 下背易伤 — 身体保持刚性.
通过团身、半团身、单腿进阶.

en: Lie back, low back pressed to floor.
Arms overhead, legs straight, both lifted.
Hold the dish shape — abs locked.
zh-Hans: 仰躺, 下背紧贴地面.
双臂过头, 双腿伸直, 同时抬起.
保持碗型 — 腹部收紧.

en: Lie face down, arms overhead.
Lift arms, chest, and legs together.
Hold — squeeze glutes and back.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 双臂前伸.
双臂、胸部、双腿同时抬起.
保持 — 收紧臀部和背部.

en: Face down, arms straight over head.
Lift chest and thighs, body arched.
Hold — counterpart to hollow body.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 双臂在头部前方伸直.
胸部和大腿抬起, 身体反弓.
保持 — 空心支撑的反向.

en: Kick up to wall, hands shoulder-width.
Stack body — wrists, shoulders, hips, heels.
Push floor away, hold for time.
zh-Hans: 踢上墙, 双手与肩同宽.
身体堆叠 — 腕, 肩, 髋, 脚跟.
推地, 保持时间.

en: Practice falling out safely — cartwheel out.
zh-Hans: 练习安全脱离 — 侧手翻下来.

en: Kick up to balance, no wall.
Tight body, slight curve at lower back.
Fingertip pressure for balance control.
zh-Hans: 踢上至平衡, 不靠墙.
身体绷紧, 下背略弯.
指尖发力控制平衡.

en: Master wall handstand first.
Learn to bail safely from any position.
zh-Hans: 先掌握靠墙倒立.
学会任意位置安全脱离.

en: Lunge stance, hands plant on floor.
Front leg drives, back leg kicks up.
Stack body upside down, control.
zh-Hans: 弓步姿势, 双手撑地.
前腿发力, 后腿踢上.
倒立叠合, 控制平衡.

en: Practice near wall first for safety.
zh-Hans: 先靠墙练习以保安全.

en: False grip on bar, explosive pull.
Lean back, transition over the bar.
Press up to full lockout.
zh-Hans: 假握杠, 爆发上拉.
身体后倾, 过渡至杠上.
推起至完全伸直.

en: Need 12+ pull-ups and 10+ dips first.
Bicep tendon strain risk — train transition carefully.
zh-Hans: 先要能做 12+ 引体, 10+ 双杠.
易拉伤肱二头肌腱 — 谨慎练过渡.

en: False grip on rings, hollow body start.
Pull to rings at sternum.
Roll wrists, press to support.
zh-Hans: 吊环假握, 空心起始.
拉至胸骨高度.
翻腕, 推起至支撑.

en: Even harder than bar — train false grip first.
Use foot assistance to learn.
zh-Hans: 比单杠更难 — 先练假握.
学习时用脚辅助.

en: Hang from bar, depress shoulders.
Tuck knees tight, lift to horizontal.
Hold body parallel to floor.
zh-Hans: 杠下悬挂, 肩部下压.
团身, 抬至水平.
身体与地面平行.

en: Train scapular strength first.
zh-Hans: 先练习肩胛骨力量.

en: Hang, depress shoulders fully.
Body to horizontal — straight, parallel to floor.
Hold the position — extreme core/back.
zh-Hans: 悬挂, 肩部完全下压.
身体水平 — 笔直, 与地面平行.
保持姿势 — 极强核心/背.

en: Progress through tuck, advanced tuck, straddle.
zh-Hans: 通过团身、半团身、分腿进阶.

en: Hang from bar facing away — inverted start.
Lower body to horizontal, face down.
Body straight, parallel to ground.
zh-Hans: 悬挂背对杠 — 反向起始.
身体下放至水平, 面朝下.
身体笔直, 与地面平行.

en: Bicep tendon strain risk — go very slowly.
Progress through tuck variations.
zh-Hans: 易拉伤肱二头肌腱 — 慢慢练.
通过团身进阶.

en: Hands on floor, lean forward heavily.
Tuck knees tight to chest, lift off floor.
Hold — feet, knees lifted, body floats.
zh-Hans: 双手撑地, 大幅前倾.
团身膝盖紧抱胸, 脚离地.
保持 — 脚、膝抬起, 身体悬浮.

en: Lean far forward, body horizontal off floor.
Body parallel to floor — straight legs.
Hold — extreme shoulder strength.
zh-Hans: 大幅前倾, 身体水平离地.
身体与地面平行 — 双腿伸直.
保持 — 极强肩部力量.

en: Progress through tuck, advanced tuck, straddle, full.
Wrist preparation essential.
zh-Hans: 通过团身、半团身、分腿、全俯撑进阶.
必须先做手腕准备.

en: On all fours, knees off floor 5 cm.
Crawl forward — opposite hand & foot move.
Hips low, back flat, slow controlled steps.
zh-Hans: 四肢撑地, 膝盖离地 5 cm.
向前爬 — 对侧手脚同步.
髋部放低, 背部平直, 缓慢稳定.

en: Sit with hands behind, knees bent.
Lift hips, walk forward or backward.
Keep hips up — glutes engaged.
zh-Hans: 坐姿双手撑后方, 双膝弯曲.
髋部抬起, 向前或向后走.
髋部保持抬高 — 臀部收紧.

en: Stand, hinge to floor, walk hands out.
Reach plank, optional push-up.
Walk feet to hands, stand up.
zh-Hans: 站立, 髋部铰链至地, 双手向前爬.
至平板支撑, 可加俯卧撑.
双脚走向双手, 站起.

en: Plank with feet on wall, knees off floor.
Walk hands and feet up the wall.
Reach near-handstand, walk down.
zh-Hans: 脚撑墙的平板, 膝盖离地.
双手脚交替上爬.
接近倒立后, 倒爬下来.

en: Warm wrists thoroughly, build slowly.
zh-Hans: 充分热身手腕, 循序渐进.

en: Stand tall, hold support if needed.
Lift one knee up, out to side, behind.
Slowly trace biggest possible circle.
zh-Hans: 站直, 必要时扶物.
一膝上抬, 外展, 后伸.
缓慢画出最大圆.

en: Stand or sit tall, opposite arm braces.
Slowly trace largest possible circle.
Forward, up, back, down — controlled.
zh-Hans: 站姿或坐姿挺直, 对侧手稳定身体.
缓慢画出最大圆.
前, 上, 后, 下 — 控制好.

en: Sit tall, shoulders down.
Trace largest circle with chin.
Slow — no fast head movement.
zh-Hans: 坐姿挺直, 肩部下压.
下巴画最大圆.
缓慢 — 不要快速转头.

en: Stop if dizzy or pain — neck is sensitive.
zh-Hans: 头晕或疼痛要停 — 颈部敏感.

en: Stand or sit tall.
Trace biggest possible circle from torso.
Lean forward, side, back, side.
zh-Hans: 站姿或坐姿挺直.
用躯干画最大圆.
前倾, 侧倾, 后倾, 另一侧倾.

en: Sit, both legs at 90° — one in front, one behind.
Lean over front knee for stretch.
Pivot knees to switch to other side.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 双腿 90° — 一前一后.
前倾压前膝拉伸.
膝盖转动换至另一侧.

en: Squat as deep as comfortable — heels down.
Elbows inside knees, push knees out.
Hold 30-90 s, relax into position.
zh-Hans: 尽量深蹲 — 脚跟着地.
肘部在膝内, 推膝外展.
保持 30-90 秒, 放松进入姿势.

en: Low lunge, both hands inside front foot.
Drop forearms to floor if mobile enough.
Hold 30-60 s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 低弓步, 双手放前脚内侧.
灵活的话, 前臂着地.
保持 30-60 秒, 换边.

en: Side-lying, knees bent, arms stacked.
Top arm sweeps open like a book page.
Eyes follow hand, rotate from upper back.
zh-Hans: 侧躺, 双膝弯曲, 双手叠放.
上方手如翻书般打开.
眼睛随手, 上背带动旋转.

en: Sit, hands behind, knees bent.
Lift hips, rotate one hand under to opposite side.
Reach high with rotating arm, then alternate.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 双手后撑, 双膝弯.
髋部抬起, 一手从下方穿向对侧.
另一手高伸, 左右交替.

en: Stand back against wall, arms in 'W' position.
Slide arms up to 'Y' overhead.
Keep elbows, wrists, back touching wall.
zh-Hans: 背靠墙站, 双臂呈 W 字.
双臂沿墙上滑成 Y 字.
肘, 腕, 背始终贴墙.

en: Wide grip on band in front of body.
Pull band up, over head, behind back.
Reverse — slow, no shrugging.
zh-Hans: 弹力带宽握于身前.
上举, 过头, 至身后.
反向 — 缓慢, 不耸肩.

en: Start wide grip — narrow as mobility builds.
zh-Hans: 从宽握开始 — 灵活度增加再握窄.

en: Back foot up on bench/couch, front in lunge.
Squeeze glutes, tuck pelvis.
Hold 60-90 s each side.
zh-Hans: 后脚放凳/沙发上, 前脚弓步.
收紧臀部, 髋部前倾.
每边保持 60-90 秒.

en: Intense quad stretch — ease into it.
zh-Hans: 大腿前侧拉伸强烈 — 慢慢进入.

en: Stand toes 10 cm from wall.
Drive knee forward to touch wall — heel down.
10-15 reps per side, work farther each session.
zh-Hans: 脚趾距墙 10 cm.
膝盖前推触墙 — 脚跟着地.
每侧 10-15 次, 每次远一点.

en: Kneeling lunge, back knee on floor.
Squeeze rear glute, tilt pelvis under.
Hold 30-60 s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 跪姿弓步, 后膝着地.
收紧后侧臀部, 髋部前送.
保持 30-60 秒, 换边.

en: Kneel, walk hands forward.
Hips stay over knees, chest sinks down.
Forehead to floor, hold 30-60 s.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 双手向前走.
髋部在膝上方, 胸部下沉.
额头触地, 保持 30-60 秒.

en: Kneel, big toes touch, knees wide.
Sit back to heels, arms extended forward.
Forehead to floor — breathe deep.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 拇趾相触, 双膝分开.
坐向脚跟, 双臂前伸.
额头着地 — 深呼吸.

en: Hands and feet on floor, hips high.
Body forms inverted V, heels reach down.
Press chest toward thighs, hold 30-60 s.
zh-Hans: 双手双脚着地, 髋部抬高.
身体呈倒 V, 脚跟向下.
胸口推向大腿, 保持 30-60 秒.

en: Lie face down, hands under shoulders.
Press chest up, hips stay on floor.
Open chest, hold 20-30 s.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 双手在肩下.
胸部推起, 髋部贴地.
打开胸部, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: Front shin parallel to body, hip-width.
Back leg long behind, lower torso forward.
Hold 60-90 s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 前小腿与身体平行, 与髋同宽.
后腿伸长, 上身前倾下沉.
保持 60-90 秒, 换边.

en: Use blocks under hip if knee is high.
zh-Hans: 髋抬高时膝下垫砖.

en: Quadruped position, one arm threads under.
Rest shoulder and head on floor.
Hold 20-30 s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 四足支撑, 一臂从下穿过.
肩部和头部贴地.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Arms extended, hands clasped or open.
Slowly trace circles with wrists.
10 each direction, prep for handstand work.
zh-Hans: 双臂前伸, 双手相握或张开.
缓慢画圆.
每方向 10 次, 倒立前准备.

en: Sit or stand, lift one foot.
Trace circles with toes.
10 each direction per foot.
zh-Hans: 坐姿或站姿, 抬一脚.
脚尖画圈.
每脚每方向 10 次.

en: Quadruped, knees wide, ankles outside knees.
Sit hips back toward heels.
Hold 60+ s, breathe into hips.
zh-Hans: 四足支撑, 双膝宽分, 踝在膝外.
髋部后坐向脚跟.
保持 60 秒以上, 髋部呼吸.

en: Wide stance, sit to one side fully.
Other leg extended straight, heel down.
Shift side to side smoothly.
zh-Hans: 宽距站, 一侧深蹲.
另一腿伸直, 脚跟着地.
两侧顺畅切换.

en: Lie back, knees up, arms wide.
Drop knees to one side, head to other.
Hold 30 s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双膝抬起, 双臂平展.
双膝倒向一侧, 头转向另一侧.
保持 30 秒, 换边.

en: Wide grip on PVC/stick in front of body.
Lift overhead, pass behind back.
Reverse — no shrugging, slow.
zh-Hans: 宽握 PVC/棍于身前.
上举过头, 至身后.
反向 — 不耸肩, 缓慢.

en: Sit tall, shoulders down.
Slowly drop chin toward chest.
Hand on head for slight assist, hold 20-30 s.
zh-Hans: 坐姿挺直, 肩部下压.
下巴缓慢下垂至胸口.
手轻压头部辅助, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: Wide stance, arms in T.
Hinge to one side, opposite hand to floor.
Top arm reaches sky, eyes follow.
zh-Hans: 宽距站, 双臂呈 T.
向一侧铰链, 对侧手触地.
上方手指天, 眼随手.

en: Hold a wall or pole for balance.
Swing one leg front to back, controlled.
10-15 swings, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 扶墙或杆保持平衡.
一腿前后摆动, 控制好.

en: Face wall, both hands on it for balance.
Swing leg across body, then out wide.
10-15 reps each leg.
zh-Hans: 面对墙, 双手扶墙保持平衡.
腿横扫越过身体, 再向外摆.

en: Arms straight out at shoulder height.
Small circles forward, build to large.
Reverse direction — 20-30 s total.
zh-Hans: 双臂平伸至肩高.
向前画小圆, 渐进至大圆.
反向画 — 共 20-30 秒.

en: Hands on wall, one leg back straight.
Heel pressed down, lean into wall.
Hold 30-60 s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 双手扶墙, 一腿后伸直.
脚跟按地, 身体前倾.
保持 30-60 秒, 换边.
